Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Continued To Mar-17-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Gregory P. Brock, Esq. appeared for Guadalupe Perez, the Guardian ad litem for the minor, Marifer Perez. Neither the Guardian ad litem nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving the appearance of the minor and the Guardian ad litem at the hearing to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was filed today, January 22, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $4,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Medical Expenses - $94.00.

The net balance of $2,906.00 shall be made payable to Guadalupe Perez, the minor's mother and guardian ad litem, under the terms of Probate Code Sections 3401-3403. The check(s) may be mailed to Guadalupe Perez at her address: Punta Pescador #208, Colonia 89, Ensenada, Baja California Norte Mexico, 22810.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
